comments: Approved. The execution contract properly constrains implementation to install.sh, setup.sh, bin/agent-protocol-init, and adapters/*.tpl, and its out_of_scope clause correctly forbids modifying MCP server logic in src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, deleting legacy Python scripts, and refactoring Markdown outside adapter templates. The recon packet is materially consistent with those boundaries: its explicit in-scope and out-of-scope sections match the contract, and its references to MCP initialization and runtime state generation are framed as script behavior rather than permission to modify MCP source or broaden the committed artifact set. One enforcement note: the recon packet's state-generation language should be interpreted strictly as runtime behavior performed by the allowed scripts, not as authorization to add unrelated static implementation artifacts or manually refactor repository task/history content beyond the approved file set.
